name_en: 🆕N40748 Blue Check! The 'zippie wallet' from the 'damiericious' series reinterprets damier canvas with charming colors. A special edition item, this iconic wallet features a slim silhouette and a round zipper closure, creating a fresh and feminine atmosphere with soft colors. The cleverly designed interior is divided into multiple compartments for bills, cards, and documents. 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm
